description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build that runs in the default stage using the golang:1-alpine Docker image. Set the variable CGO_CFLAGS to -DSQLITE_ENABLE_FTS5. In the script, install gcc and libc-dev via apk add gcc libc-dev, create the directory $GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/dtjm/linky, copy the repository contents into it, change to that directory, and compile the Go program with go build -v main.go. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
